scripts.service:start: sudo env BUN=$(command -v bun) bun modules/service/manage.ts start
scripts.service:stop: sudo env BUN=$(command -v bun) bun modules/service/manage.ts stop
scripts.service:restart: sudo env BUN=$(command -v bun) bun modules/service/manage.ts restart
scripts.service:status: sudo env BUN=$(command -v bun) bun modules/service/manage.ts status
scripts.service:uninstall: sudo env BUN=$(command -v bun) bun modules/service/manage.ts uninstall
